title: Mega Man Zero
prompt:
Original illustration inspired by a retro Adventure game.

A lone agile cyber warrior with an energy blade in a ruined red-orange industrial battlefield with broken columns and warning lights, standing ready just before a dash into danger.

Visual focus:
- one clear subject
- strong silhouette
- readable in 1 second
- exactly one primary focal subject
- no crowd, no collage, no multi-character scene

Style:
- Game Boy Advance aesthetic, bright controlled colors, portable action framing, and clean pixel readability
- pixel art or stylized rendering depending on platform
- clean and modern interpretation of retro limitations
- limited color palette when relevant

Mood:
- urgent, sharp, heroic

Composition:
- single cyber warrior only, one clear blade silhouette, slashed ruins behind, no crowd
- simple background
- no clutter

Important:
- Do NOT replicate any official character, logo, or design
- Do NOT imitate exact game assets
- Must feel original but clearly inspired by the game's genre and atmosphere

Output:
- high clarity
- strong contrast
- minimal noise
- no text
- no watermark

Important - do NOT include: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid Zero likeness, avoid exact helmet fins, avoid official saber shapes, avoid franchise insignia, avoid resemblance to mega man. No copyrighted characters, no logos, no recognizable IP.
negative_prompt: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid Zero likeness, avoid exact helmet fins, avoid official saber shapes, avoid franchise insignia, avoid resemblance to mega man
revised_prompt: Imagine a scene from a retro-style adventure game with modern interpretations. Picture a single cyber warrior standing alone in a desolate industrial battlefield, painted in shades of red and orange. The ruins around him are dotted with broken columns and sporadic warning lights, creating a perfect stage for his imminent run towards danger. This warrior holds a glowing energy blade, his silhouette forming a powerful symbol in the otherwise barren landscape. The image is drawn with bright, controlled colors, echoing the aesthetics of a Game Boy Advance but without directly imitating any known game assets or characters. Despite its retro inspiration, the resulting image feels fresh, original, and remarkably readable even by the standards of modern gaming art. Remember to keep the composition clean – no clutter, crowds, or multiple characters. The scene should convey a sense of urgency and heroism, all in a high-contrast, noise-free output. Please ensure no text, watermarks, or copyrighted elements are included.
